sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Tackle Breaking
special_mechanics.description: Players can break tackles during gameplay, adding a layer of depth to offensive and defensive play

special_mechanics.name: Play Selection Defense
special_mechanics.description: Defensive players select plays based on anticipation of offensive choice; correct prediction results in offensive line collapse and well-covered receivers

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data. This is a sports game (American football), not a platformer. Available sources focus on gameplay mechanics, roster information, and release history. No detailed physics parameters (gravity, jump mechanics, sub-pixel systems, acceleration values) are documented in the provided sources. Such parameters are not typically documented for sports games in the same manner as action/platformer titles.
